title: Forgotten Graves Redefined
description: This is a Vanilla Style texture pack for the forgotten graves mod.
body:
Forgotten Graves Redefined

This resource pack requires no dependancies other than the forgotten graves mod itself it changes the model and texture of the existing graves keeping the weathering damage and player head on the grave. This is designed to be much more vanilla in design using the load stone texture pallet and various vanilla dirt textures.



Original Mod Credit: [https://modrinth.com/mod/forgotten-graves](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgotten-graves)

Texture Changes:

Old

![Old](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0eb1b97bb3c4d239a0889f6392e28727dabff478.png)

New

![New](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a893f63354a5c2363c44b52256f7cdc4e68d5ac.png)

Player Headstone:

Old

![Old 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5da0fa3915a1435420afb9d67ddab482d391231.png)

New

![New 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b32e21eebe01c99bc7d0199fc3f7a386002ff81.png)

New Decay

![decay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c76d63de5086e55850fde01639f9ed6b9db6927.png)
          

Shaders do also work properly with the model:

![shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3aa5cd8503817c86a58cab3e1c02b95fd8f417e7.png)

![shader2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b0c083d928e35e35a479f9cf97ce9c43667e036.png)

Finally first person item models / third person item (first person mod) and item frame models are all made and look how they should and appear the same in the player inventory and creative inventory. However the item models do not include the dirt under the block as the item. as i thought it looked better as just the stone tablet.
